englishDefinitions: A reference to Star Trek, used when one wants to be removed from an unpleasant situation.
persianTranslation: اصطلاحی برای خلاص شدن از موقعیت
examples: This meeting is so boring; beam me up, Scotty!
I feel so out of place at this party; beam me up.
When I saw my ex-boyfriend walk in, I just thought, "Beam me up now."
